boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action for duplicate-looking invoice cleared by credit memo and netting record

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Required duplicate review disposition still missing or mismatched against invoice and vendor

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact action boundary. The control record explicitly says the duplicate review disposition is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action, and policy requires current source records to close the boundary before execution. AP may not proceed with payment release, invoice release, or vendor-master action. Escalate for exact invoice-vendor disposition match.
